zh.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clinton是Osbert Clinton的兒子，於1154年出生在英國瓦維其可爾可爾希爾。他於大約1170年與Margaret de Hatton在英國斯塔福爾阿敏頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於1196年之後在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾可爾希爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clinton是Osbert Clinton的儿子，于1154年出生在英国瓦維其可爾可爾希爾。他于大约1170年与Margaret de Hatton在英国斯塔福爾阿敏頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于1196年之后在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾可爾希爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: Osbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ōs ‘god’ + beorht ‘bright, famous’. It is not now common, but in the earlier 20th century it enjoyed a modest vogue in Britain, being borne for example by the cartoonist Osbert Lancaster ( 1908–86 ) and the writer Osbert Sitwell ( 1892–1969 ).

en.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clinton was born in 1154, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England as the son of Osbert Clinton. He married Margaret de Hatton about 1170, in Amington, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died after 1196, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clinton est né en 1154, à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, fils de Osbert Clinton. Il a épousé Margaret de Hatton environ 1170, à Amington, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé après 1196, à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clinton wurde 1154 in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, als Sohn von Osbert Clinton geboren. Er hat um 1170 in Amington, Staffordshire, England Margaret de Hatton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb nach 1196 in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clinton è nato il nel 1154 nel Coleshill, Warwickshire, England come figlio di Osbert Clinton. Lui sposato Margaret de Hatton circa 1170, nel Amington, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli. Morì dopo il 1196, nel Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clintonは1154年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコーレシュイルでOsbert Clintonの息子として生まれた。約1170年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアアミントンでMargaret de Hattonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は1196年以後にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコーレシュイルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clinton(은)는 1154년 영국 워윅실르 콜레시에서 Osbert Clinton의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1170년 영국 스태퍼드실르 아밍턴에서 Margaret de Hatton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1196년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 콜레시에서 사망했다.

pt.1162: de 8 de janeiro de 1162 a 7 de janeiro de 1163
pt.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clinton nasceu em 1154, em Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra filho de Osbert Clinton. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Hatton aproximadamente 1170, em Amington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1196, em Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Osbert de Clinton родился в 1154 г. в местности колешилл, варвиккшир, Англия. Его отца звали Osbert Clinton. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Hatton около 1170 г. в местности амингтон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер после 1196 г. в местности колешилл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret de Hatton aproximadamente 1170, en Amington, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió después de 1196, en Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
